chapter_title: Regul. of Outdoor Signs on Rural Roads
text:
(a) The combined license and permit fees under this subchapter may not exceed $10 for an off-premise sign erected and maintained by a nonprofit organization in a municipality or a municipality’s extraterritorial jurisdiction if the sign relates to or promotes only the municipality or a political subdivision whose jurisdiction is wholly or partly concurrent with the municipality.

(b) The nonprofit organization is not required to file a bond as provided by Section 394.0202 (Issuance and Period of License) (a)(3).
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 394. Regul. of Outdoor Signs on Rural Roads
##### § 394.029 — Exceptions for Certain Nonprofit Organizations

(a) The combined license and permit fees under this subchapter may not exceed $10 for an off-premise sign erected and maintained by a nonprofit organization in a municipality or a municipality’s extraterritorial jurisdiction if the sign relates to or promotes only the municipality or a political subdivision whose jurisdiction is wholly or partly concurrent with the municipality.

(b) The nonprofit organization is not required to file a bond as provided by Section 394.0202 (Issuance and Period of License) (a)(3).

*Added by Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1345 (S.B.1420), Sec. 49(a), eff. September 1, 2011.*

subsections.label: a

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: The nonprofit organization is not required to file a bond as provided by Section 394.0202 (Issuance and Period of License) (a)(3).
